title: Is There a Galactic Battle for Earth?
summary: A brief discussion about the Church of Scientology's beliefs regarding UFOs and an alleged galactic battle between Pleiadian humanoids and Zeta Reticulan reptilians for control over Earth. The guest distances themselves from this worldview when asked directly.

key_claims.claim: The Church of Scientology's highest principle involves UFOs and a belief in a confrontation between humanlike beings from the Pleiades and reptilians from Zeta Reticuli over which group will establish major relations with Earth
